title: Interrupt Enable/Disable Flow
description: A flowchart showing the decision process and state changes involved in enabling and disabling interrupts in a CPU.
relationships: Main program execution is interrupted by an IRQ
CPU checks the state of the IEF to decide if it can proceed
If IEF is set (1), the CPU saves state and jumps to the Interrupt Handler
If IEF is clear (0), the IRQ is ignored and main program continues
Interrupt Handler executes, then returns control to the main program
